patch.value: pm aggregate --sum/--avg: numeric aggregation over filtered items
aggregate only counts. Sprint planning/throughput need sum/avg of estimated_minutes by sprint/type. Existing group_by+filters already handle the hard part.
pm aggregate --sum/--avg <numeric-field> --group-by <f> outputs per-group sum/avg+count+null_count; filters pass through.
